headlines.headline: Yorval Partners to host investor day focused on process automation strategy

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy could provide clarity and potentially positive outlooks, but the immediate impact is uncertain until the content is revealed.

headlines.headline: Yorval Partners secures $50M contract with a top-tier research institute

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
